## Summary

- What changed:
- Why:

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch targets the correct base (`develop` for features, `master` for release)
- [ ] CI passes (`CI / validate`)
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files included
- [ ] Migration impact reviewed (if DB schema changed)
- [ ] Screenshots added for UI changes (if applicable)

## Release notes

- [ ] Requires release note entry
- [ ] No release note needed
